gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT award_id) FROM contracts WHERE recipient_name ILIKE '%Lockheed Martin%' AND awarding_agency_name = 'NASA' AND fiscal_year = 2025
SELECT SUM(total_obligation) FROM contracts WHERE recipient_name ILIKE '%Booz Allen Hamilton%' AND fiscal_year = 2024
SELECT SUM(total_obligation) FROM contracts WHERE recipient_name ILIKE '%Lockheed Martin%' AND fiscal_year = 2024
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT award_id) FROM contracts WHERE recipient_name ILIKE '%Booz Allen%'
SELECT awarding_agency_name, COUNT(DISTINCT award_id) AS award_count FROM contracts WHERE recipient_name ILIKE '%Boeing%' GROUP BY awarding_agency_name ORDER BY award_count DESC

SELECT recipient_name, SUM(total_obligation) AS total FROM contracts WHERE awarding_agency_name = 'Department of Homeland Security' AND fiscal_year = 2026 GROUP BY recipient_name ORDER BY total DESC LIMIT 10
SELECT awarding_agency_name, COUNT(DISTINCT award_id) AS award_count FROM contracts WHERE recipient_name ILIKE '%Deloitte%' GROUP BY awarding_agency_name ORDER BY award_count DESC
SELECT awarding_agency_name, COUNT(DISTINCT award_id) AS award_count FROM contracts WHERE recipient_name ILIKE '%Raytheon%' GROUP BY awarding_agency_name ORDER BY award_count DESC

SELECT recipient_name, SUM(total_obligation) AS total FROM contracts WHERE awarding_agency_name = 'Department of Health and Human Services' AND fiscal_year = 2024 GROUP BY recipient_name ORDER BY total DESC LIMIT 10
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT award_id) FROM contracts WHERE awarding_agency_name = 'Department of Homeland Security' AND fiscal_year = 2026

SELECT recipient_name, SUM(total_obligation) AS total FROM contracts WHERE awarding_agency_name = 'Department of Health and Human Services' AND fiscal_year = 2024 GROUP BY recipient_name ORDER BY total DESC LIMIT 5

SELECT recipient_name, SUM(total_obligation) AS total FROM contracts WHERE awarding_agency_name = 'Department of Health and Human Services' AND fiscal_year = 2024 GROUP BY recipient_name ORDER BY total DESC LIMIT 20

SELECT CASE WHEN total_obligation = 0 THEN 'zero' WHEN total_obligation IS NULL THEN 'missing' END AS bucket, COUNT(*) FROM contracts WHERE recipient_name ILIKE '%Boeing%' AND (total_obligation = 0 OR total_obligation IS NULL) GROUP BY bucket
SELECT * FROM contracts WHERE awarding_agency_name = 'Department of Homeland Security' AND total_outlay IS NULL

SELECT CASE WHEN total_obligation = 0 THEN 'zero' WHEN total_obligation IS NULL THEN 'missing' END AS bucket, COUNT(*) FROM contracts WHERE recipient_name ILIKE '%Deloitte%' AND (total_obligation = 0 OR total_obligation IS NULL) GROUP BY bucket

SELECT CASE WHEN total_obligation = 0 THEN 'zero' WHEN total_obligation IS NULL THEN 'missing' END AS bucket, COUNT(*) FROM contracts WHERE recipient_name ILIKE '%Raytheon%' AND (total_obligation = 0 OR total_obligation IS NULL) GROUP BY bucket
SELECT * FROM contracts WHERE awarding_agency_name = 'Department of Health and Human Services' AND fiscal_year = 2025 ORDER BY total_obligation DESC LIMIT 20
